Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4
In this training, Dean is going to briefly touch on what makes a page a good landing page and what makes it a bad landing page. Plus he is going to
give you a simple blueprint you can use to price out your mastermind. Whether it’s 5 people at $1,000 each or its 100 people at $25,000, Dean will give
you a simple structure to pick your price.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Remember that the length of your videos and length of pages doesn’t matter. It’s what’s in the video and on the page that truly matter.
Think through the value of your time. How much is a two day weekend worth to you?
Then think through how many people you would like in your group, workshop or mastermind.
Divide the amount your weekend is worth by how many people you want in the group.
